title: Keretapi Tanah
description: ktmb.com.my zoominfo.com/c/keretapi-tanah-melayu-berhad/21365008 KTMB (Keretapi Tanah Melayu Berhad) is Malaysia's largest and oldest railway company, with a rail network spanning 1,699 km across Peninsular Malaysia, extending into Singapore and Thailand. It operates multiple services including KTM Komuter (urban commuter trains since 1995), ETS electric intercity trains, and diesel-powered KTM Intercity trains. The company was privatized in 1992 and today offers online ticketing via its website and mobile app, with a QR-code boarding system
